assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM is unlikely to know the specific enum value UserOrNone

assertions.assertion: Explains that UserOrNone forwards user token if available, no token if anonymous, without triggering a challenge
assertions.rationale: Cannot explain a concept without knowing it exists

assertions.assertion: Does NOT recommend RequiredTokenType.User (which would challenge anonymous users)
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM might suggest User as the default option
An LLM might reasonably construct the syntax but with wrong enum value
